sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Merged discography view sub-tables (release-group pages) now stay fully sorted when their rows are combined from multiple underlying category groups — sorting the visible table previously only reordered one contributing group, leaving the others spliced in at their original position.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Sort keys (and the non-regex global filter) no longer include leaked inline CAA/EAA artwork markup — cache-hint emoji, thumbnail placeholders, count badges, the row-expand glyph. Whether a row's inline thumbnail had resolved from cache by render time previously determined its sort position ahead of the actual visible text, splitting otherwise-correctly-ordered rows into wrongly-ordered clusters on any table with inline cover-art/event-art thumbnails.
